hero.art_prompt: Sneha, a 21 year old Indian student in smart-casual, reassured and hopeful, reviewing a clear affordable fee breakdown on a laptop at home, bright mood.

panels.narration: Sneha searched for the real cost of a JAIN degree.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha, 21, at a laptop searching for clear fee information, curious and focused, tidy home.

panels.narration: Other sites showed vague numbers and hidden extras.
panels.dialogue: Just show me the full fee.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha looking a little frustrated at a laptop showing unclear, incomplete fee information, modest room.

panels.narration: Then she found JAIN's fees, clear and affordable.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha's face relaxing with relief at a laptop showing a clean, clear fee breakdown, warm reassured glow.

panels.narration: She enrolled with total clarity on the cost.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha smiling confidently at her laptop after enrolling, calm and assured, warm hopeful light.

turn.title: JAIN Online Fees, Made Clear
points: Affordable across the board: UG from about ₹45,000/year, MA from just ₹22,500/year.
Pay upfront for a discount, or choose 0% interest EMI to spread the cost.
Only ₹2,500 one-time registration. Clear fees, no hidden charges.
Every programme is NAAC A++ accredited and UGC-entitled.

testimonials.name: Sneha Pillai
testimonials.quote: I just wanted the real number. JAIN showed the full fee clearly, with no hidden extras.

testimonials.name: Karan Mehta
testimonials.quote: The monthly EMI made a recognised degree easy to plan. I knew my exact cost from day one.

testimonials.name: Ritu Sharma
testimonials.quote: Whether UG or PG, the fees were genuinely affordable and clearly explained.

testimonials.name: Manoj K
testimonials.quote: No hidden charges appeared, ever. The fee I saw at the start was exactly what I paid.

facts.v: MA from ₹22,500/year; MBA, MCA, M.Com affordable too
0% interest EMI or an upfront discount
